title: Login does not display error message when wrong password is entered
summary: Submitting a valid email with an incorrect password does not show the expected 'Invalid email or password.
description: When a user attempts to log in with a correct email and a wrong password, the application fails to display the error message 'Invalid email or password.' instead of rejecting the credentials visibly. This means users receive no feedback on failed login attempts, which is both a usability and security concern.
expected_result: The error message 'Invalid email or password.' should be visible on the page.
actual_result: No error message is displayed; the element 'Invalid email or password.' is not found in the DOM after submitting invalid credentials.
